basic_details.organization_name: Raj Chaunria Higher Secondary School Kodinga
basic_details.short_information: Raj Chaunria Higher Secondary School Kodinga (RCHSS Kodinga) Lecturer in Political Science (Guest Faculty) Notification 2026 has been released on 03 July 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 Lecturer in Political Science (Guest Faculty) vacancy has been announced through the RCHSS Kodinga Lecturer in Political Science (Guest Faculty) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master Degree in Political Science with 55% of Marks
qualification.details: Master Degree in Political Science with 55% of Marks

content_sections.heading: RCHSS Kodinga Lecturer in Political Science (Guest Faculty) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the RCHSS Kodinga Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download RCHSS Kodinga Lecturer in Political Science (Guest Faculty) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: RCHSS Kodinga Lecturer in Political Science (Guest Faculty) Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Master Degree in Political Science with 55% of Marks

content_sections.heading: RCHSS Kodinga Lecturer in Political Science (Guest Faculty) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for RCHSS Kodinga Lecturer in Political Science (Guest Faculty) Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: RCHSS Kodinga Lecturer in Political Science (Guest Faculty) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the RCHSS Kodinga recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name is Lecturer in Political Science (Guest Faculty) for the RCHSS Kodinga recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Lecturer in Political Science (Guest Faculty) post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master Degree in Political Science with a minimum of 55% marks.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 12000 Per Month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the mode of application?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q6. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled for 17 July 2026.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST).

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type?
faq.answer: The job type is Contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located in Kodinga, Odisha.
